properties.label: Set as stack Menu bar
properties.name: MacOS Menu Bar
properties.toolTip: Set the stack's menubar property to the current menu bar

properties.name: Menu Buttons
properties.toolTip: Select a menu name to change it or edit its menu items

properties.name: New Menu
properties.toolTip: Create a new menu at the horizontal bar

properties.name: Move Menu Up
properties.toolTip: Move the selected menu up

properties.name: Move Menu Down
properties.toolTip: Move the selected menu down

properties.name: Menu Name
properties.toolTip: Enter a menu name and press Return to change the name of the selected menu

properties.name: Delete Menu
properties.toolTip: Remove the selected menu from the current menu bar

properties.name: Menu Mnemonic Letter
properties.toolTip: Choose a letter in the menu name to use as an Alt-key shortcut

properties.name: Edit Script
properties.toolTip: Open the script editor to change the menu's script

properties.name: Auto Script
properties.toolTip: Insert a framework script to handle menu items in the selected menu

properties.label: Disabled

properties.toolTip: Make the selected menu disabled (grayed out)

properties.toolTip: Assign an Alt-key shortcut to the selected menu
Unix and Windows systems only

properties.name: Menu Items
properties.toolTip: Select a menu item to change it

properties.name: Item Name
properties.toolTip: Enter a menu item name and press Return to change the name of the selected menu item

properties.name: Move Item Down
properties.toolTip: Move the selected menu item down

properties.name: Move Item Up
properties.toolTip: Move the selected menu item up

properties.name: New Item
properties.toolTip: Create a new menu item in the current menu, at the horizontal bar

properties.name: Delete Item
properties.toolTip: Remove the selected menu item from the menu

properties.toolTip: Place a check or diamond next to the selected menu item

properties.toolTip: Make the selected menu item into a submenu item

properties.name: Insert Divider
properties.toolTip: Insert a divider line at the horizontal bar

properties.toolTip: Choose an existing menu bar to make changes to
